## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other:

## Documentation

**Always update documentation when behavior, configuration, or workflow changes.**

- [ ] README updated (if user-facing setup, commands, or wizard flow changed)
- [ ] Code comments / docstrings updated for new or changed functions
- [ ] Wizard step list / numbering in README updated (if a step was added, removed, or reordered)
- [ ] YAML config keys documented (if a new key was added or an existing key's shape changed)
- [ ] N/A — no behavior, config, or workflow change

## Validation

<!-- How did you test this? Which CU(s), which snapshot date(s)? -->

- [ ] `py_compile` clean on all changed Python files
- [ ] Manually walked through the affected wizard step(s)
- [ ] End-to-end import + report run verified on at least one real CU
- [ ] N/A — trivial / docs-only change

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewer should pay special attention to, known limitations, follow-ups, etc. -->
